producer_note: Yomeishu is a herbal medicinal liqueur produced since 1602 at Komagane City, Nagano Prefecture.
Right Bank is a generic geographic descriptor for Bordeaux's eastern bank covering Saint-Emilion, Pomerol, Fronsac and other appellations, not a single producer.
Hawkshead Brewery brews and distills in Staveley, Cumbria, in the English Lake District since 2002.
Old Particular is an independent bottler range from Douglas Laing of Glasgow, sourcing single casks from Highland, Speyside, Islay and other Scotch regions.
Junenmyo is a single malt whisky produced by Wakatsuru Shuzo, a brewery/distillery based in Tonami, Toyama Prefecture.
Masumi is produced by Miyasaka Brewing Company, founded 1662 in the Suwa region of Nagano. Famous as the origin of yeast No. 7.
Chateau Haut-Cardinal is a Saint-Emilion Grand Cru estate on Bordeaux's Right Bank, producing primarily Merlot-based wines.
Kinmon Akita Sake Brewery is in Daisen-shi, southeast Akita Prefecture, known for aged sake (koshu) Yamabuki.
Cuban Cohiba cigars use tobacco from Vegas Finas de Primera in San Luis and San Juan y Martinez of the Vuelta Abajo region, Pinar del Rio.
Poli Distillerie is a family grappa distillery founded 1898 in Schiavon, near Bassano del Grappa in Veneto.
Fattoria Galardi is on the inactive Roccamonfina volcano in northern Campania, producing the cult Terra di Lavoro IGT (Aglianico/Piedirosso).
L'Esprit de Mandrin is a craft eau-de-vie from Saint-Martin-d'Heres near Grenoble in the Dauphine region.
Mount Gay is the world's oldest commercial rum distillery (deed 1703), located in Saint Lucy parish in northern Barbados.
Cognac Drouet & Fils is a family estate south of Cognac, with vineyards in Grande and Petite Champagne but bottling primarily Grande Champagne crus.
Glen Grant is a single malt distillery founded 1840 in Rothes, Speyside, owned by Campari Group since 2005.
Fattoria di Fiorano is a historic estate just outside Rome along the Via Appia Antica, producing Lazio IGT wines from Cabernet, Merlot, Semillon and Malvasia.
Brugal & Co was founded 1888 with bottling in Puerto Plata and distilling in San Pedro de Macoris.
American Eagle is a Tennessee bourbon launched 2019 by a small family distillery in Tennessee using the Lincoln County Process.
Champagne E. Michel is a grower-producer based in Vertus, in the Cote des Blancs sub-region of Champagne.
Crystal Head Vodka is produced at Rock Spirits/Newfoundland and Labrador Liquor Corporation distillery in Newfoundland, Canada.
Lambertus whisky is produced by Radermacher Distillery (founded 1836) in Raeren, in the German-speaking community of eastern Belgium.
Alexander Grappa is produced by Bottega SpA in the Treviso area of Veneto, using Prosecco grapes.
King's Inch is a Glasgow single malt distilled at Glasgow Distillery, in Scotland's Lowland region.
Windspiel is a potato-based gin produced from potatoes grown in the Volcanic Eifel region of western Germany.
Lark Distillery, founded 1992 by Bill Lark in Hobart, was the first modern Tasmanian whisky distillery and remains based in the Coal River Valley, Tasmania.
Peter in Florence is a London Dry Gin produced at a micro-distillery in the Florentine hills of Tuscany using local Tuscan juniper.
Champagne Allart & Fils is a grower based in Cernay-les-Reims, on the Montagne de Reims in the Champagne region.
Plantation Isle of Fiji is rum from Rum Co. of Fiji distillery in Pacific Harbour, Fiji, finished in France by Maison Ferrand.
Evade is a French single malt whisky double-distilled in Charente stills, from French barley, by Whiskies du Monde.
J.J. Corry is an Irish whiskey bonder based on a family farm in Cooraclare, County Clare, with a maturation rackhouse near Kilrush.
Liverpool Gin is produced at the Liverpool Gin Distillery on Castle Street in central Liverpool, Merseyside.
Fever-Tree is a London-based premium tonic and mixer brand sourcing botanicals globally and contract-manufacturing across multiple sites.
G'Vine is a French grape-based gin produced at Maison Villevert in Merpins, Charente, in the heart of the Cognac region.
Argiolas is a Sardinian estate based in Serdiana (Parteolla) since 1938 with vineyards across Trexenta and Sulcis areas of Sardinia.
El Dorado is produced by Demerara Distillers Ltd at Plantation Diamond on the East Bank of the Demerara River, Guyana's last operating distillery.
Birrificio Agricolo Baladin was founded 1996 by Teo Musso in Piozzo, in the Langhe area of Piedmont.
Grand Marnier blends Cognac eaux-de-vie sourced from across all five Cognac crus with bitter orange essence, headquartered at Chateau de Bourg-Charente.
Plantation Venezuela rum is distilled at Destileria Sofa in Venezuela and double-aged in Charente, France by Maison Ferrand.
Togouchi whisky is produced by Sakurao Distillery in Hatsukaichi, Hiroshima, and matured in a former rail tunnel in Akiota near Togouchi.
Yaguara cachaca is distilled at Weber Haus distillery in Rio Grande do Sul (with reported family farm operations in Parana).
Sakurao Distillery is in Hatsukaichi, Hiroshima Prefecture, on the Seto Inland Sea, producing gin and whisky since 2018 (parent company since 1918).
Villa Zarri is a brandy distillery at the historic Villa Zarri in Castel Maggiore, province of Bologna, Emilia-Romagna, distilling Trebbiano wine.
Rekorderlig cider is produced by Abro Bryggeri in Vimmerby, Sweden, using local spring water.
Martin Miller's gin is distilled in England then shipped to Iceland for blending with Icelandic spring water; spans two countries by design.
Calvados Roger Groult has produced Calvados Pays d'Auge AOC at Saint-Cyr-du-Ronceray in Normandy since 1860 using double pot distillation.
Silkie is produced by Sliabh Liag Distillers in Carrick, County Donegal, the first legal whiskey producer in Donegal in nearly 200 years.
Caorunn gin is handcrafted at Balmenach Distillery near Cromdale in Speyside, using Celtic botanicals in a copper berry chamber.
Maracatu Cachaca is hand-crafted in small batches at a boutique distillery in the Paraty region of Brazil.
Hiroki Shuzo has been brewing sake since the Edo period in Aizubange, in the Aizu Basin of western Fukushima.
Palacios Remondo is based in Alfaro in Rioja Oriental (formerly Rioja Baja), under Alvaro Palacios with a focus on Garnacha.
Yoshidagura U is a natural sake brand produced by Yoshida Sake Brewery in Hakusan City, Ishikawa Prefecture, established 1870.
Afuri is a sake brand from Kikkawa Jozo brewery in Isehara City, Kanagawa Prefecture, named after the local Afuri (Tanzawa Oyama) mountain.
Provenance is an independent bottler range from Douglas Laing of Glasgow, with single-cask malts drawn from distilleries across Scotland's regions.
Mc Chouffe is brewed by Brasserie d'Achouffe in the village of Achouffe in the Belgian Ardennes (Luxembourg province).
Deschutes Brewery was founded 1988 in Bend, Oregon, and operates main production there with a Portland brewpub.
West Cork Distillers is based in Skibbereen, County Cork, founded 2003, and is one of Ireland's largest craft distilleries.
Komasa Jyozo, founded 1883, distills shochu and gin in Hioki, Kagoshima Prefecture, also operating the nearby Kanosuke whisky distillery.
Monkey 47 is distilled by Black Forest Distillers in Lossburg, in the Schwarzwald (Black Forest) region of Baden-Wurttemberg, Germany.
Excellia tequila is produced from agave grown in Los Altos (the Highlands) of Jalisco at the Tapatio Distillery, finished in Sauternes and Cognac casks.
Yatagarasu is produced by Kitaoka Honten in Yoshino Town, Yoshino District of Nara Prefecture, founded 1868.
Berneroy (Beneroy) is a Calvados produced in the Pays d'Auge AOC of Normandy, single-distilled and aged in Limousin oak.
Rum Sixty Six is distilled, aged and bottled at Foursquare Rum Distillery in Saint Philip, Barbados.
Benriach is a Speyside single malt distillery founded 1898, located south of Elgin in north Speyside, owned by Brown-Forman.
Red Beast is a Barossa Valley Shiraz from South Australia, sourced from the Barossa region.
Generous Gin is distilled at OX Distillery in Charente-Maritime, near La Rochefoucauld in the broader Cognac area of France.
2:am is a Barossa Valley Shiraz from South Australia, made from Barossa-grown grapes.
Oban is a Highland single malt distillery founded 1794 in the west-coast port town of Oban, Argyll, owned by Diageo.
Compass Box is a London-based blender (founded 2000) sourcing single malts and grain whiskies from across Islay, Speyside, Highland and Lowland regions.
Chateau Reynon is a Dubourdieu family estate in Beguey within the Cadillac Cotes de Bordeaux AOC on the right bank of the Garonne.
Distilleria Nonino has been producing artisan grappa since 1897 in Percoto (Pavia di Udine), Friuli-Venezia Giulia.
Jura is the sole distillery on the Isle of Jura in the Inner Hebrides, founded 1810 and rebuilt in the 1960s, owned by Whyte & Mackay.
Chateau La Tour Carnet is an 1855 Fourth Growth in the Haut-Medoc appellation, the largest Classified Growth, owned by Bernard Magrez.
Tyrrell's Wines, founded 1858 in Pokolbin, is a Hunter Valley winery, with additional vineyards in Heathcote, Victoria.
Dr. Burklin-Wolf is a historic family estate in Wachenheim, Pfalz, with vineyards in Forst, Wachenheim, Deidesheim and Ruppertsberg.
Maison Dartigalongue, founded 1838 in Nogaro, is the oldest Bas-Armagnac producer, located in the western Bas-Armagnac district.
Left Bank is a generic geographic descriptor for Bordeaux's western bank covering the Medoc and Graves appellations, not a specific producer.
Tenuta Talamonti was established 2001 in Loreto Aprutino in Abruzzo, focusing on Montepulciano d'Abruzzo and Trebbiano d'Abruzzo.
The Glenlivet is a Speyside single malt distillery near Ballindalloch in Moray, founded 1824 by George Smith, owned by Pernod Ricard.
Anwilka Vineyards is in the Helderberg sub-area of Stellenbosch, sister winery to Klein Constantia, producing a Syrah-Cabernet blend.
Kellerei St. Pauls is a cooperative winery founded 1907 in St. Pauls, a hamlet of Eppan an der Weinstrasse in South Tyrol (Alto Adige).
Domaine Gerard Duplessis is a 5th-generation Chablis producer with 9 hectares entirely within Chablis and Petit Chablis AOCs, organic since 2013.
Chateau Pontac-Lynch is a Cru Bourgeois estate of about 10 hectares in the Margaux appellation, straddling Margaux and Cantenac communes.
Feudi del Pisciotto is an estate in Niscemi (Caltanissetta) within the Cerasuolo di Vittoria DOCG area of southeastern Sicily's Val di Noto.
Chateau Laroque is a Saint-Emilion Grand Cru Classe estate, the largest in Saint-Emilion at 61 hectares, owned by the Beaumartin family since 1935.
Chateau Cantemerle is an 1855 Fifth Growth in the Haut-Medoc appellation, located in the commune of Macau with vineyards across Macau and Ludon.
Cuatro Mil Cepas is a winery in the Toro DO of Zamora, Castilla y Leon, producing Tinta de Toro red wines.
Bodegas Comenge, founded 1999, is in Curiel de Duero in the Ribera del Duero DO with 32 hectares of certified-organic vineyards.
Eric Morgat established his domaine in 1995 in the Savennieres appellation of Anjou, Loire Valley, with 6 hectares of biodynamic Chenin Blanc.
Antica Fratta is a Franciacorta DOCG sparkling wine producer in Monticelli Brusati, Lombardy, with origins from the 1800s.
Chateau Meyre is an organic Cru Bourgeois Superieur estate in Avensan, with 18 hectares in Haut-Medoc and 2 in Margaux appellation.
Schramsberg Vineyards is a sparkling wine estate in Calistoga, Napa Valley, California, founded 1862 and re-established for sparkling wine in 1965.
